name: open-krode
description: OpenCode plugin for kro RGD visualization and live instance observability

scripts.build: echo "export const BUILD_TIME = '$(date -u '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M UTC')';" > src/build-stamp.ts && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun --format esm && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly && bun scripts/write-ui-html.ts
scripts.install:plugin: bun run build && mkdir -p ~/.cache/opencode/node_modules/open-krode/dist && cp dist/index.js ~/.cache/opencode/node_modules/open-krode/dist/index.js && cp dist/ui.html ~/.cache/opencode/node_modules/open-krode/dist/ui.html && cp package.json ~/.cache/opencode/node_modules/open-krode/package.json

author: rrroizma
